Index.title: Mongolia-CERN LHCb 2026
Index.hero_sub: Science Development Accelerator NGO connects Mongolian scientists with CERN and the global research community — bringing world-class science to Mongolia and showcasing Mongolian talent to the world.
Index.hero_cred: 📷 Science Development Accelerator NGO representatives at CERN — Geneva, Switzerland
Index.mission_title: Advancing Mongolian Science on the Global Stage
Index.mission_lead: We believe in the power of collaboration and the potential of Mongolian talent. Our goal is to create bridges between local researchers and world-class institutions like CERN.
Index.impact_desc: Direct participation in the world's largest particle physics experiment.
Index.growth_desc: Nurturing the next generation of Mongolian physicists and engineers.
Index.innovation_desc: Bringing cutting-edge detector and computing technology to Mongolia.
Index.education_desc: Intensive training and workshops for students and researchers.
Index.event_desc: Join us for five days of intensive scientific exchange, featuring lectures from world-renowned CERN scientists, student poster sessions, and cultural excursions.
Index.cta_title: Be Part of the Future of Mongolian Science
Index.cta_desc: Whether you're a student, researcher, or potential sponsor, there's a place for you in the Mongolia-CERN collaboration.

Speakers.title: Our Distinguished Speakers
Speakers.lead: Meet the leading scientists and researchers from CERN and partner institutions who will be sharing their insights during LHCb 2026.
Speakers.poster_title: Want to Join as a Speaker?
Speakers.poster_desc: The student poster session is still open for submissions. Show your research to the global HEP community.

Agenda.title: Event Agenda
Agenda.lead: A comprehensive five-day program including scientific talks, public lectures, and cultural activities.
Agenda.no_sessions: No sessions scheduled for this day yet.
Agenda.download_desc: Get the full brochure with session abstracts and speaker bios.

About.title: Dedicated to Scientific Excellence in Mongolia
About.lead: The Mongolia-CERN LHCb 2026 conference is organized by a coalition of non-governmental and academic institutions committed to advancing high-energy physics research.
About.team_lead: The board and executive team driving Science Development Accelerator NGO’s mission to advance science in Mongolia.

Contact.title: Contact Organizing Committee
Contact.lead: Have questions about registration, sponsorship, or the scientific program? Our team is here to help.
Contact.office_address: Naran Khotkhon 21v-2, Peace Avenue, 1st Khoroo, Khan-Uul District, Ulaanbaatar

Partners.title: Our Partners & Organizers
Partners.lead: LHCb 2026 is made possible through the combined efforts of non-profit organizations, academic institutions, and international research facilities.
Partners.cta_desc: We are open to partnerships with technology companies, academic institutions, and media outlets who share our vision for advancing science.
